name: Remote Connection Established via Msbuild
description: Detects network connections initiated by MSBuild.exe, specifically to ports 80 (HTTP) or 443 (HTTPS). This can indicate malicious activity, such as downloading payloads or exfiltrating data during a seemingly benign build process.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the network connection event.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The Sysmon Event ID for Network Connection (3).

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The name of the process that initiated the network connection, which should be 'msbuild.exe'.

parameters.name: source_ip
parameters.description: The source IP address of the connection.

parameters.name: source_port
parameters.description: The source port of the connection.

parameters.name: destination_ip
parameters.description: The destination IP address of the connection.

parameters.name: destination_port
parameters.description: The destination port of the connection (expected to be 80 or 443).

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which MSBuild.exe was executed.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The hostname where the event occurred.
